commands.cmd: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/nutrition-reference.test.ts tests/unit/nutrition.test.ts tests/unit/nutrition-profile.test.ts

summary: Implemented a validated pure-domain reference system with exact source/version metadata, DV/DRI kind separation, amount/range/percent-energy forms, life-stage matching, UL source scope, explicit canonical gaps, general-information disclaimers, consent-gated estimated-energy disclosure, and all 35 FDA adult/children 4+ Daily Values from the cited current FDA page. Added seven focused tests and decision 0030 without touching persistence, Pantry, profiles, routes, UI or providers.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Worker exceeded the single-wait limit without writing files, so the PM executed the same three-file package as permitted fallback.
